concept: Detonação curta com núcleo branco, anel radial vermelho-laranja e oito cinders âmbar que se dispersam e retornam ao ember.
selectionRationale: VFX de explosão novo, diferente do smoke loop e do core flare existentes; os cinders radiais dão leitura de impacto sem adicionar fumaça ou conexão de runtime.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a Bomba PvP bomb/explosion VFX. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of a compact white-hot detonation core that erupts into eight amber-orange cinder shards and a thin red-orange radial ring, reaches a broad bright burst, then sheds the cinders and returns to a small ember core for a clean loop. Each cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, crisp readable pixel-art explosion silhouette, no text and no UI. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no floor, no shadow, no gradient, no texture. Subject: isolated bomb detonation VFX with a central core, radial ring and cinder fragments. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art game VFX with limited white, amber, orange, red-orange and deep-navy accents, hard readable edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered effect in every cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: punchy competitive arena detonation, readable at small runtime size. Color palette: white-hot center, amber-gold shards, orange-red ring, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: luminous pixel clusters, sharp triangular cinders and clean radial energy strokes. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, smoke plume, fireball cloud, bomb body or scenery. Avoid: duplicate frames, cut-off shards, empty cells, messy smoke, inconsistent framing and nonuniform background.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Helper remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key de borda, soft matte, despill e edge-contract 1; depois recorte interno de 40px e extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick após a remoção de halo pelo helper.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado após a remoção de chroma-key; núcleo, anel, oito cinders, ápice e dispersão permanecem legíveis, sem halo magenta observável.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
